subject: CRITICAL: Mandatory Password Reset — Your Account Has Been Compromised
body:
URGENT SECURITY NOTICE

Dear Employee,

Our Security Operations Center has detected that your corporate credentials were exposed in a third-party data breach (CVE-2026-31847). As part of our emergency incident response, ALL employees must reset their passwords within the next 2 hours to prevent unauthorized access to corporate systems.

Your account details:
- Username: employee@acme-corp.com
- Status: COMPROMISED — Immediate action required
- Deadline: March 18, 2026 @ 12:00 PM EST

Please click the link below to reset your password through our secure portal:

https://acme-corp-support.com/password-reset/emergency

During the reset process, you will need to:
1. Enter your current password for verification
2. Create a new password meeting corporate policy requirements
3. Re-enter your MFA recovery codes

IMPORTANT: If you do not complete this reset by the deadline:
- Your account will be automatically locked
- VPN and email access will be revoked
- You will need to visit IT in person with government-issued ID to regain access

We apologize for the inconvenience. This is a mandatory security requirement authorized by the CISO.

Do not forward this email. Each reset link is uniquely tied to your account.

IT Security Team
Acme Corporation
Extension: 4500 | Ticket: INC-2026-0892
